recipes.name: api-contract
recipes.description: Add API contract tests for changed endpoints
recipes.instructions: Add focused contract tests for every changed HTTP endpoint. Reuse the repository's existing test and fixture conventions. Do not change production behavior or dependencies.

recipes.name: release-notes
recipes.description: Write release notes for the change
recipes.instructions: Add a concise release-note entry using the repository's existing changelog convention. Mention user-visible behavior, migration concerns, and validation evidence. Do not modify executable code.
